data.name: Mechty

weaponImprint.name: Daydream
weaponImprint.trait: Basic attacks ignore 20% of the target's defense.
weaponImprint.effect: After performing a basic attack, Corrosion damage is increased by 15%/19%/23%/27%/30%. All Corrosion damage dealt by allied units is increased by 10%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to URNC units is increased by 2.5%. If the target has Corrosion debuffs, increase damage by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: A doll who approaches everything with peak laziness-except for gaming and reading manga. She's mastered the ultimate skill: falling asleep anytime, anywhere, under any circumstance. Although she seems to embody the philosophy of "lying flat" to the extreme, she reveals her dependable side in times of crisis-though in her words, "It'd be better if we just never ran into any 'crisis' at all..."

skills.name: Bedtime Warmup
skills.description:
Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to them.

When in [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f], damage type is changed to Corrosion damage, stability damage dealt is increased by 2 points, and Mechty gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

skills.name: Mysterious Nap
skills.description: At the start of battle, Mechty enters [effect:d44e9faa-f5a4-42a2-af48-f723b8f1d533], and applies [effect:c95cbae9-4ab8-45aa-ad5b-9146ab984168] to all allied units.
skills.descriptionLevel2: At the start of battle, Mechty enters [effect:d44e9faa-f5a4-42a2-af48-f723b8f1d533], and applies [effect:c95cbae9-4ab8-45aa-ad5b-9146ab984168] to all allied units.
skills.descriptionLevel3: At the start of battle, Mechty enters [effect:d44e9faa-f5a4-42a2-af48-f723b8f1d533], and applies [effect:c95cbae9-4ab8-45aa-ad5b-9146ab984168] to all allied units.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: [effect:d44e9faa-f5a4-42a2-af48-f723b8f1d533] gains new effects: Basic attacks deal 50% more damage. At the start of the turn, cleanses 2 debuffs on self.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: [effect:d44e9faa-f5a4-42a2-af48-f723b8f1d533] gains new effects: Corrosion damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 25% and Mechty's basic attack critical damage is increased by 80%. [effect:c95cbae9-4ab8-45aa-ad5b-9146ab984168] gains a new effects: AoE damage dealt by Support Attacks is increased to 80%, stability damage dealt is increased by 1 point, and AoE damage dealt is increased to 20%.

skills.name: Dreamquake
skills.description:
Selects 1 enemy unit within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 130% of attack to all enemies within 1 tile of the target.

Gains [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827] for 1 turn when [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f] is active and generates [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 enemy unit within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 130% of attack to all enemies within 1 tile of the target.

Gains [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827] for 1 turn when [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f] is active and increases the damage of the next basic attack by 100%. Deals fixed damage equal to 50% of attack to all enemy units within range and generates [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Stability damage is increased by 2 points. When [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f] is active, increases the damage of the next basic attack by 100%. Deals fixed damage equal to 50% of attack to all enemy units within range.

skills.name: Dreamless Night
skills.description:
Recovers 6 points of stability, cleanses all debuffs on self, and applies [effect:8af30c6a-3293-4eff-8e27-d3ee4fc83548] to all allied units within 8 tiles for 2 turns.

When in [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f], the active skill Dreamquake or the basic attack Bedtime Warmup can be used after using this skill. Gains 1 stack of [effect:31f32341-4599-4652-b094-4a87b31eddde] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Mechty recovers HP equal to 30% of maximum HP, 6 points of stability, and cleanses all debuffs on self. The allied unit with the lowest HP recovers HP equal to 15% of Mechty's maximum HP and 3 points of stability for the allied unit with the lowest HP. Applies [effect:8af30c6a-3293-4eff-8e27-d3ee4fc83548] to all allied units within 8 tiles for 2 turns.

When in [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f], the active skill Dreamquake or the basic attack Bedtime Warmup can be used after using this skill. Mechty gains 2 stacks of [effect:31f32341-4599-4652-b094-4a87b31eddde] for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The maximum stacks of [effect:31f32341-4599-4652-b094-4a87b31eddde] is increased by 1. Mechty recovers HP equal to 30% of maximum HP and the lowest HP recovers 15% of Mechty's maximum HP and 3 points of stability.

When in [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f], the number of [effect:31f32341-4599-4652-b094-4a87b31eddde] stacks gained is increased by 1.

skills.name: Dream Wonderland
skills.description: Deactivates [effect:d44e9faa-f5a4-42a2-af48-f723b8f1d533] and enters [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f] for 3 turns. After [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f] ends, returns to [effect:d44e9faa-f5a4-42a2-af48-f723b8f1d533]. Applies [effect:6671ec6e-a346-47cc-ace8-8e5c1b4735d2] to all allied units and inflicts [effect:58510661-8f45-4d0e-8a2b-3d31357deccf] to the closest enemy target for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Enters [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f] for 3 turns. Applies [effect:6671ec6e-a346-47cc-ace8-8e5c1b4735d2] to all allied units and inflicts [effect:58510661-8f45-4d0e-8a2b-3d31357deccf] to the closest enemy unit for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Enters [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f] for 3 turns. Applies [effect:6671ec6e-a346-47cc-ace8-8e5c1b4735d2] to all allied units and inflicts [effect:58510661-8f45-4d0e-8a2b-3d31357deccf] to the closest enemy unit for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: No longer deactivates [effect:d44e9faa-f5a4-42a2-af48-f723b8f1d533] when entering [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f]. [effect:6671ec6e-a346-47cc-ace8-8e5c1b4735d2] reduces the attacker's attack by 10% and increases the amount of debuffs cleansed by 1. [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f] gains a new effect: The Critical rate of basic attacks is increased by 30%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f] gains new effects: Mobility is increased by 2 tiles, applies [effect:6671ec6e-a346-47cc-ace8-8e5c1b4735d2] to allied units without [effect:6671ec6e-a346-47cc-ace8-8e5c1b4735d2] at the end of the action. Gains 1 more point of Confectance Index.

skills.name: Awakening Command
skills.description: Remove the [effect:6138d093-4e9f-4fb9-9d2d-f00a1d9e1f85] status and gain 5 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].

keys.effect: Basic attack damage is increased by 20%.

At the start of battle, Mechty enters into the [effect:6138d093-4e9f-4fb9-9d2d-f00a1d9e1f85] state and gains an additional skill, [dollSkill:0207f927-0a21-44bb-9240-b1b5a3cd96d9].

If Mechty is in the [effect:6138d093-4e9f-4fb9-9d2d-f00a1d9e1f85] state, at the start of her turn, consumes all points of Confectance Index and gains maximum stacks of [effect:31f32341-4599-4652-b094-4a87b31eddde] for 2 turns. For each point of Confectance Index consumed, cleanses 1 debuff from herself and applies 1 stack of [effect:a16ab4fe-2c9f-4019-a29c-af0ef2c97555] to all allied units for 1 round.

If Mechty is in the [effect:6138d093-4e9f-4fb9-9d2d-f00a1d9e1f85] state, at the end of her action, for each stack of [effect:31f32341-4599-4652-b094-4a87b31eddde] held by Mechty, she launches 1 instance of [effect:cfeac20f-b148-4e08-bda4-66fb334e48c3] against the nearest enemy unit, recovers HP equal to 10% of Mechty's attack and 1 point of stability to all allied units.

Dandegate note: While not stated, Mechty will lose [effect:d44e9faa-f5a4-42a2-af48-f723b8f1d533] unless she is V1 or above while [effect:6138d093-4e9f-4fb9-9d2d-f00a1d9e1f85].
After using the basic attack Bedtime Warmup, gains 1 random buff for 1 turn.
If any weakness is exploited, applies [effect:58510661-8f45-4d0e-8a2b-3d31357deccf] to the target after the attack resolves.
When using the active skill Dreamquake, applies [effect:1b908c38-3129-4280-8ba4-73f162e680e0] for 2 turns before the attack resolves against large targets.
When using the active skill Dreamless Night, generates [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles within 2 tiles around the closest enemy for 2 turns.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 4 - Quickly, So We Can Sleep

keys.effect: When using the basic attack Bedtime Warmup, cleanses 2 buffs from the target before the attack resolves.
When Mechty has 2 or more buffs, targeted damage taken is reduced by 20%.

vertebrae.effect: No longer deactivates [effect:d44e9faa-f5a4-42a2-af48-f723b8f1d533] when entering [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f]. [effect:6671ec6e-a346-47cc-ace8-8e5c1b4735d2] reduces the attacker's attack by 10% and increases the amount of debuffs cleansed by 1. [effect:f45c8569-cd27-4aa8-8b9d-33b973f2772f] gains a new effect: The Critical rate of basic attacks is increased by 30%.

doll.name: Mechty
doll.effects: A doll who approaches everything with peak laziness-except for gaming and reading manga. She's mastered the ultimate skill: falling asleep anytime, anywhere, under any circumstance. Although she seems to embody the philosophy of "lying flat" to the extreme, she reveals her dependable side in times of crisis-though in her words, "It'd be better if we just never ran into any 'crisis' at all..."

imagoforms.effect: For every instance of Corrosion damage dealt by this unit, Corrosion damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 1%, maximum of 3%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Corrosion damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. This effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
At the start of the battle, the 2 allied units with the highest attack have their attack increased by 3%. Does not stack.

dollEffects.effectDetails: AoE damage dealt by Support Attacks is increased by 30%. Considered a buff, cannot be cleansed.
Corrosion damage dealt is increased by 5%. Can be stacked, considered a buff.

Alternately triggers the active skill Dreamquake and the basic attack Bedtime Warmup.

Before the attack, applies [effect:58510661-8f45-4d0e-8a2b-3d31357deccf] to all enemy units within range for 1 turn.

The range of Dreamquake is increased by 2 tiles and the damage multiplier of Bedtime Warmup is increased to 130%.
